title: The Fastest Way to Know if Your Product Market Fit Is Real | Serval CEO, Jake Stauch
summary: Jake Stauch, CEO of Serval, argues that product-market fit is signaled by customer pull (pricing inquiries) rather than passionate enthusiasm, and that authentic validation comes from embedded observation in customer workflows rather than formal interviews. He emphasizes distinguishing real PMF signals from founder delusion and betting on AI model trajectories rather than current capabilities.
